title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Byju's - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Byju's - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Byju's in Faridabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Byju's:
Byju's is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Byju's!
